description: Style NoteUnderstated colouring on the base with shiny stones makes these sandals classy and elegant. They can be worn with Ethnic Indian wear. This pair of catwalk sandals can be worn to work with a pair of jeans and a nice kurta and some ethnic accessories.Heel: 1.5"Product DetailsBlunt toed sandals with a strap at the forefoot and midfootAnkle loop with a zipperColourful beads across the midfoot and ankle loopMini wedge heel with a brownish beige footbed and a heel patchTPR outsoleMaterial and CareSyntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
